section.heading: Cross references

paragraph.content: For penalties and administrative provisions applicable to this subchapter, see subtitle F.
For exemption for uses by Indian tribal governments (or their subdivisions), see section 7871.

section.sourceCredit: (Added June 29, 1956, ch. 462, title II, § 206(a), 70 Stat. 391; amended Pub. L. 97–473, title II, § 202(b)(10), Jan. 14, 1983, 96 Stat. 2610.)

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1983—Pub. L. 97–473 designated existing provisions as par. (1) and added par. (2).

note.heading: Effective Date of 1983 Amendment
note.p: For effective date of amendment by Pub. L. 97–473, see section 204(5) of Pub. L. 97–473, set out as an Effective Date note under section 7871 of this title.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective June 29, 1956, see section 211 of act June 29, 1956, set out as an Effective Date of 1956 Amendment note under section 4041 of this title.
